articles.title: APCRDA approves better benefits for Amaravati land pooling farmers
articles.sum: The Chief Minister directed officials to ensure that each of the 25 townships proposed across the 217 sq. km Amaravati capital region includes at least one national or international school and a modern hospital

articles.title: ED raids in U.P. against former SP MLA
articles.sum: Multiple cases booked against the politician include those related to cheating, forgery, extortion, attempt to murder, dacoity etc., registered under the IPC, UP Gangsters Act, Goondas Act etc., says officials

articles.title: Prashant Kishor calls upcoming by-election at Bankipur Assembly a “referendum” on BJP government in Bihar
articles.sum: The by-poll at Bankipur constituency is scheduled to be held on July 30, and the results will come out on August 3. The Bankipur Assembly seat had fallen vacant after BJP’s Nitin Nabin, who had won the poll in the 2025 Assembly election, was later elected as party national presid...

articles.title: Significance of Guwahati Declaration adopted by BRICS nations | Explained
articles.sum: The Guwahati Declaration underscores the need to bolster the timely exchange of information and best practices, consistent with national laws and international obligations

articles.title: India supports two-state solution for solving Israel-Palestine conflict, says PM Modi
articles.sum: In a press statement in Jakarta while presiding over the signing of multiple agreements including the delivery of BrahMos supersonic cruise missile system and Astra Mk-1 beyond the visual-range air-to-air missiles to Indonesia, Mr. Modi says India believes that the role of dialog...

articles.title: Floods, landslides affect several Arunachal districts
articles.sum: According to the SEOC, Upper Siang was the worst-hit district, followed by Siang and Kra-Daadi; Upper Siang recorded landslides at 16 locations

articles.title: Greater Bengaluru Development Minister Krishna Byre Gowda orders crackdown on vehicles parked on footpaths
articles.sum: Instructs officials to initiate action against dumping of construction debris on footpaths

articles.title: 12 years of civilisational diplomacy: How PM Modi restored India's shared heritage across Asia
articles.sum: One of the earliest initiatives came in Vietnam, where India signed a Memorandum of Understanding in 2014 to restore the UNESCO-listed Mỹ Sơn Sanctuary. Once the spiritual centre of the ancient Champa Kingdom, the Shaivite temple complex is regarded as one of Southeast Asia's mos...

articles.title: 'It got Rs 160 crore from TMC’: ED searches Kolkata company over aircraft deal
articles.sum: Enforcement Directorate searched five locations in Kolkata Tuesday. The agency is probing an aviation firm's alleged financial dealings. Carewell Aviation reportedly received Rs 160 crore from TMC funds. This money was allegedly used to purchase an aircraft and a helicopter. The ...
